3000297.title: Cat & mouse
3000297.description: "Cat & Mouse", portrays a brief narrative of the dance performed when predator meets prey. Jim Henson (The Muppets) used collage and drawings to animate a story, displaying his unique visual shorthand used to create distinctive characters.
